request: Show me employee birthdates and home addresses.
search_document:
User Request: Show me employee birthdates and home addresses.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Employee Distribution by Region
Type: chart
Description: Number of employees in each region
Title: Employee Count by Title
Type: table
Description: Count of employees grouped by their job titles
Title: Total Employees
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of employees in the organization

sql_queries.title: Employee Distribution by Region
sql_queries.description: Number of employees in each region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Region", COUNT("EmployeeID") AS "NumberOfEmployees" FROM "Employees" GROUP BY "Region"

sql_queries.title: Employee Count by Title
sql_queries.description: Count of employees grouped by their job titles
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Title", COUNT("EmployeeID") AS "EmployeeCount" FROM "Employees" GROUP BY "Title"

sql_queries.title: Total Employees
sql_queries.description: Total number of employees in the organization
